payload.title: (Stretch) LAN peer gossip over existing mTLS — no central host
payload.description:
(Stretch) Keep LAN real-time without a central host: peers gossip events directly over the existing mTLS pairing.

## Work
- Reuse the CA / device-pairing / bearer-token machinery built for the iOS client. Paired peers on a LAN discover each other (mDNS) and push new event files as they're appended.
- Layers on top of event-sourcing: gossip is a faster transport for the same append-only events; offline falls back to git/file-sync.

## Acceptance
- Two paired machines on a LAN see each other's changes within ~100ms with no central scope serve host. A later git pull of the same changes is a no-op.
